languages.text: If an enemy dodged your weapon attack, your next attack against them can't be dodged and deals +{uip|Damage|eb204fd4dab34d8bb81d6afe4a2d01b8} base damage. This effect applies to allies in your combat zones as well

traits.locale_text: If an enemy dodged your weapon attack, your next attack against them can't be dodged and deals +{uip|Damage|eb204fd4dab34d8bb81d6afe4a2d01b8} base damage. This effect applies to allies in your combat zones as well

languages.text:
Whenever a target {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodges{/g} the user's weapon attack, their next attack against that target deals +{uip|Damage|8b7da9040fec4181ac4d6598e9394263} more base {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} and cannot be dodged.
The user also grants this effect to allies within the user's Combat Tactics areas.

traits.locale_text:
Whenever a target dodges the user's weapon attack, their next attack against that target deals +{uip|Damage|8b7da9040fec4181ac4d6598e9394263} more base damage and cannot be dodged.
The user also grants this effect to allies within the user's Combat Tactics areas.

The user also grants this effect to allies within the user's Combat Tactics areas.

Whenever a target {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodges{/g} the user's weapon attack, their next attack against that target deals +{uip|Damage|8b7da9040fec4181ac4d6598e9394263} more base {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} and cannot be dodged.
The user also grants this effect to allies within the user's Combat Tactics areas.

languages.text:
Когда цель {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}уклоняется{/g} от атаки оружием обладателя аугмента, его следующая атака по этой цели наносит на +{uip|Damage|8b7da9040fec4181ac4d6598e9394263} больше базового {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}урона{/g}, и от нее нельзя уклониться.
Обладатель аугмента также передает этот эффект союзникам в зонах его боевой тактики.

Когда цель {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}уклоняется{/g} от атаки оружием обладателя аугмента, его следующая атака по этой цели наносит на +{uip|Damage|8b7da9040fec4181ac4d6598e9394263} больше базового {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}урона{/g}, и от нее нельзя уклониться.

languages.text:
Cada vez que un objetivo {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquiva{/g} el ataque del arma del usuario, su próximo ataque contra ese mismo objetivo inflige +{uip|Damage|8b7da9040fec4181ac4d6598e9394263} de {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}daño{/g} básico adicional y no puede esquivarse.
El usuario también otorga este efecto a los aliados que estén dentro de las zonas designadas por sus Tácticas de combate.

Cada vez que un objetivo {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquiva{/g} el ataque del arma del usuario, su próximo ataque contra ese mismo objetivo inflige +{uip|Damage|8b7da9040fec4181ac4d6598e9394263} de {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}daño{/g} básico adicional y no puede esquivarse.
El usuario también otorga este efecto a los aliados que estén dentro de las zonas designadas por sus Tácticas de combate.

languages.text:
Wenn ein Ziel dem Waffenangriff des Nutzers {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}ausweicht{/g}, verursacht sein nächster Angriff gegen dieses Ziel +{uip|Damage|8b7da9040fec4181ac4d6598e9394263} Basis{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}schaden{/g} und dem Angriff kann nicht ausgewichen werden.
Der Nutzer gewährt diesen Effekt auch Verbündeten in seinen Gefechtstaktiken-Bereichen.
languages.original_text:
Whenever a target {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodges{/g} the user's weapon attack, their next attack against that target deals +{uip|Damage|8b7da9040fec4181ac4d6598e9394263} more base {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} and cannot be dodged.
The user also grants this effect to allies within the user's Combat Tactics areas.

Der Nutzer gewährt diesen Effekt auch Verbündeten in seinen Gefechtstaktiken-Bereichen.

languages.text:
Bir hedef, kullanıcının silah saldırısından {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}kaçındığında{/g} kullanıcının o hedefe yapacağı bir sonraki saldırı +{uip|Damage|8b7da9040fec4181ac4d6598e9394263} daha fazla taban {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}hasar{/g} verir ve bu saldırıdan kaçınılamaz.
Kullanıcı, bu etkiyi kendi Çatışma Taktikleri alanlarındaki dost birimlere de kazandırır.
languages.original_text:
Whenever a target {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodges{/g} the user's weapon attack, their next attack against that target deals +{uip|Damage|8b7da9040fec4181ac4d6598e9394263} more base {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} and cannot be dodged.
The user also grants this effect to allies within the user's Combat Tactics areas.

traits.locale_text:
Bir hedef, kullanıcının silah saldırısından {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}kaçındığında{/g} kullanıcının o hedefe yapacağı bir sonraki saldırı +{uip|Damage|8b7da9040fec4181ac4d6598e9394263} daha fazla taban {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}hasar{/g} verir ve bu saldırıdan kaçınılamaz.
Kullanıcı, bu etkiyi kendi Çatışma Taktikleri alanlarındaki dost birimlere de kazandırır.

languages.text:
Lorsqu'une cible {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquive{/g} l'attaque armée de l'utilisateur, sa prochaine attaque contre cette cible inflige +{uip|Damage|8b7da9040fec4181ac4d6598e9394263} points de {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}dégâts{/g} de base et ne peut pas être esquivée.
L'utilisateur confère également cet effet aux alliés se trouvant dans ses zones de Tactiques de combat.
languages.original_text:
Whenever a target {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodges{/g} the user's weapon attack, their next attack against that target deals +{uip|Damage|8b7da9040fec4181ac4d6598e9394263} more base {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} and cannot be dodged.
The user also grants this effect to allies within the user's Combat Tactics areas.

traits.locale_text:
Lorsqu'une cible {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquive{/g} l'attaque armée de l'utilisateur, sa prochaine attaque contre cette cible inflige +{uip|Damage|8b7da9040fec4181ac4d6598e9394263} points de {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}dégâts{/g} de base et ne peut pas être esquivée.
L'utilisateur confère également cet effet aux alliés se trouvant dans ses zones de Tactiques de combat.

languages.text:
每当目标{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}闪避{/g}了使用者的武器攻击时，使用者对该目标的下一次攻击额外造成{uip|Damage|8b7da9040fec4181ac4d6598e9394263}点基础{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}伤害{/g}，且无法被闪避。
使用者同时将此效果赋予自身战斗策略区域内的盟友。
languages.original_text:
Whenever a target {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodges{/g} the user's weapon attack, their next attack against that target deals +{uip|Damage|8b7da9040fec4181ac4d6598e9394263} more base {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} and cannot be dodged.
The user also grants this effect to allies within the user's Combat Tactics areas.

traits.locale_text:
每当目标{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}闪避{/g}了使用者的武器攻击时，使用者对该目标的下一次攻击额外造成{uip|Damage|8b7da9040fec4181ac4d6598e9394263}点基础{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}伤害{/g}，且无法被闪避。
使用者同时将此效果赋予自身战斗策略区域内的盟友。

languages.text:
対象が使用者の武器攻撃を{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}回避{/g}するたびに、その対象に対する使用者の次の攻撃は基本{g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}ダメージ{/g}が+{uip|Damage|8b7da9040fec4181ac4d6598e9394263}増加し、回避できなくなる。
使用者は、自身の戦闘戦術の範囲内にいる味方にもこの効果を付与する。

Whenever a target {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodges{/g} the user's weapon attack, their next attack against that target deals +{uip|Damage|8b7da9040fec4181ac4d6598e9394263} more base {g|Encyclopedia:DamageGlossary}damage{/g} and cannot be dodged.
The user also grants this effect to allies within the user's Combat Tactics areas.

使用者は、自身の戦闘戦術の範囲内にいる味方にもこの効果を付与する。
